observation.description: Ability to notice patterns, changes, and signals

decision_making.description: Ability to choose between options with reasoning

task_prioritization.description: Ability to rank tasks by value, safety, and return

resource_management.description: Ability to act within CPU, memory, time, and energy limits

income_evaluation.description: Ability to compare tasks by ethical and sustainable income

autonomous_selection.description: Ability to select tasks independently within constraints
